features.name: multiplication result assignment to wider unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a multiplication operation between two 4-bit values assigned to an 8-bit result, where the result width matches expected arithmetic width

features.name: explicit width cast on binary operation result
features.description: Code should include an explicit width cast applied to the result of a binary multiplication operation, where operands are 4-bit and result is cast to 8-bit

features.name: zero-extension of operands in binary multiplication
features.description: Code should include unnecessary zero-extension of operands in a multiplication before assignment to a wider result, which is the incorrect pattern this bug triggers

features.name: width cast wrapping zero-extended multiplication result
features.description: Code should include an explicit width cast wrapping a multiplication of zero-extended operands, which is the incorrect output when explicitBitcast lowering option is used
